# Custom Agents

This file registers custom agents for this workspace.

## managed-nebula

**File**: [agents/managed-nebula/managed-nebula-integration.agent.md](agents/managed-nebula/managed-nebula-integration.agent.md)

**Description**: Expert assistant for integrating with or extending Managed Nebula mesh VPN platform. Provides guidance on API usage, client integration, authentication, and best practices.

**Use when**: Working with Managed Nebula API, implementing VPN automation, configuring client provisioning, or building Nebula mesh network integrations.
